full_text:
Cell count average of two counts /ml

total: 30* E6

live: 14* E6

viability: 50 %

size: 8.5 um

Total cell count: 30* E6 / ml

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (6 drops):

2* 24 well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 40 wells x 40 µl x = 1600 µl

1000 cells/µl = 1.6E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 800 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 27 ul of cells + 639.4 ull of medium

ome-gel → 112.8µl

aprotinin → 2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 450 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/well = 0.38E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir, u

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 7 ul of cells +2915,5 ul of medium

ome-gel → 493.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.5.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 5*E6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker * 5 tubes

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

Drug treatment conditions (B):

Treatment done on 384-well plate for 25 uL. See plate layout

Note: Plating of omentum gel mixture to 384 well plate was challenging as the mixture was solidifying quickling. So, the plating consistency may not be good..

For flow cytometry on day 0 sample, 1.5*106 cells were taken for unstained control and antibody staining.

Culture finished on day 5

live cells stained with live-dead cell stain (1:1000 in PBS, 30 min, RT). Fixed for 30 mins with 4% PFA. Cells stored in PBS at +4C until staining (diagnosis needs to be confirmed)

5 drops fixed with 4% formaldehyde, embedded in histogel x2 (3 drops and 2 drops each). Fixing for 48 h at +4C. Stored in 70% EtOH until paraffin processing.

10 drops for DNA and RNA isolation, each, were washed with PBS and dissociated with organoid harvesting medium by 300 uL each well. Harvesting medium was left to incubate for 60 mins on rocker at +4C until drops were loosened from the bottom of the well using spatula and broken into pieces by pipetting. Incubation at +4C was continued for another 30 mins before centrifugation at +4C, 400 g, 10 mins. Washing with 2x 1 mL cold PBS and centrifugation

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | 
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | 
DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA | 
DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA |
